statua_liberta: Here is the Statue of Liberty! It's located in New York, America. It's a giant green woman holding a torch, gifted by France to welcome travelers arriving from the sea.
fontana_lindt: This is the giant Lindt chocolate fountain! It is located in Zurich, Switzerland. Imagine, it's 9 meters tall and flows with real rivers of sweet chocolate. It almost makes you want to dip a giant cookie in it!
cappello_zio_sam: This is the famous Uncle Sam's hat! It has stars and stripes just like the American flag. Uncle Sam is a friendly character invented a long time ago to represent the entire United States of America.
coltellino_svizzero: Here is the legendary red Swiss Army knife! It's not just an explorer's knife: inside you can find scissors, screwdrivers, a magnifying glass for bugs, and many other magical hidden tools.
orologio_svizzero: This is a super precise Swiss watch! In Switzerland, they are the world champions at building perfect watches. Their internal gears are tiny and they never miss the time, not even by a single second.
cartello_route_66: This is the Route 66 sign! It's the most adventurous and famous road in America: a very long ribbon of asphalt crossing old towns and fiery deserts all the way from Chicago to the beaches of California.
